autoscaling.scalingpolicy.predictivescal: Contains capacity metric information for the `CustomizedCapacityMetricSpecification` property of the [AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy PredictiveScalingMetricSpecification](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-autoscaling-scalingpolicy-predictivescalingmetricspecification.html) property type.

autoscaling.scalingpolicy.predictivescal.Description: One or more metric data queries to provide the data points for a capacity metric. Use multiple metric data queries only if you are performing a math expression on returned data.
